Blood in Urine 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
How Do You Test for Blood in Urine? A urinalysis test Â checks a sample of your urine (pee). It can find a small amount of blood cells in your urine and other types of cells, chemicals, and substances.Â 
Having blood in your urine is called hematuria. The blood may make your urine or the water in the toilet bowl turn pink, red, or reddish brown. But you might not always be able to see the bloo
